title: Fermented Asparagus Wrap
description: This vegan-friendly fermented wrap combines juicy asparagus with a tangy marinade for a refreshing meal-prep french dish.

ingredients.name: rice vinegar
ingredients.notes: Brandy or apple cider vinegar can be used as a substitute for those allergic to rice vinegar.

instructions: Prepare asparagus by washing and trimming the spears.
Mix rice vinegar, lime juice, water or lemon juice, dijon mustard, olive oil, salt, and pepper in a bowl to create the marinade. Add hemp seeds for texture.
Place asparagus spears in the marinade, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight to ferment.
After marinating, pat dry the asparagus slightly before serving it cold with vegan cheese slices inside whole-grain wraps or flatbreads. Optionally add sliced avocado for extra creaminess.
